feed.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - meta
feed.subtitle: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

entry.title: Website Update
entry.content:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 9fd4085 feat: add pipeline tree display under plots in analysis page
  • 47996f4 feat: implement collapsible pipeline/results tree with download option
  • a3ac0f0 feat: add GitHub Actions workflow for publishing analysis results without LFS po
  • 10c90e8 feat: transparent LFS pointer resolution for parquet files
  • 52268d4 debug: add log parsing diagnostics and line count indicator

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
